verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Count to three and say a prayer Down for love and up for air Underwater, overjoyed Water for a thirsty soul Water for a thirsty soul

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Baptize me into Your love Oh, my spirit's overcome Body, mind, and skin, bone Love Him, wanna make it known Love Him, wanna make it known

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I'm comin' alive, with You I'm comin' alive, with You I was livin' a lie, 'til you I'm comin' alive, with You

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: All the people say Amen! Amen! All the people say Amen! Amen! Amen! Yeah!

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Resurrection day is here Bells are ringin' loud and clear Caterpillar to a butterfly Reason to another life Reason to another life

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Yeah, I'm comin' alive, with You I'm comin' alive, with You I was livin' a lie, 'til you I'm comin' alive, with You

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: All the people say Amen! Amen! All the people say Amen! Amen! Amen! Yeah! Amen! From death to life (Amen!) From dark to light (Amen!) I'm singin' out tonight (Amen! Amen!)

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: You're in my blood, my veins In every word I pray You gave it all for me I'll give it all for You Oh, I'm in love with You Overwhelmed by You And if the world is listenin' This is my confession You are my obsession

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: All the people say Amen! Amen! All the people say Amen! Amen! Amen! Yeah! Amen! From death to life (Amen!) From dark to light (Amen!) I'm singin' out tonight (Amen! Amen!) Yeah!
